name: roadmap_list
description: List all milestones and tasks in the SwissAgent development roadmap with their current status.

name: roadmap_next_task
description: Get the next pending or in-progress task from the roadmap that the agent should work on.

name: roadmap_start_task
description: Mark a roadmap task as 'in_progress' to signal the agent is now working on it.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to start (e.g. 't5-1')

name: roadmap_complete_task
description: Mark a roadmap task as 'done' after successfully implementing it. Optionally add notes about what was done.

task_id.description: The ID of the completed task (e.g. 't5-1')

notes.description: Optional notes about what was implemented or changed

name: roadmap_add_task
description: Add a new task to a milestone in the roadmap. Use this when planning new work or breaking down a task.

milestone_id.description: The milestone to add the task to (e.g. 'm5')

description.description: Detailed description of what needs to be done
